name: DONAYAN SAHDEV
tagline: Production · Commercials · Brand Films · Music Videos
positioningLine: Helping directors transform creative vision into flawlessly executed productions.
subhead: 60+ commercial productions across India's biggest brands. From Armani Exchange to Tanishq, Lakmé to Sprite. Mumbai-based.

seo.title: Donayan Sahdev — Freelance Director's Assistant & Creative Producer
seo.description: Mumbai-based Freelance Director's Assistant and Creative Producer. 60+ commercial productions across advertising, fashion, celebrity campaigns, and music videos. Available for freelance and in-house productions.
seo.ogDescription: Freelance Director's Assistant & Creative Producer. Production · Commercials · Brand Films · Music Videos.

hero.introLine: Helping directors execute ambitious commercial productions with precision.

about.title: Bridging creative vision and production execution.
about.body:
With over five years in commercial production, I've worked across advertising, fashion campaigns, celebrity shoots, music videos, and branded content — moving fluidly between the creative table and the chaos of set.

Every project begins with a script and ends with a finished frame. What happens in between is where I live: breaking down creative into shootable reality, managing schedules that shift by the minute, coordinating talent and crew, and ensuring the director's vision survives the thousand small decisions of a production day.

I've worked on sets with Kareena Kapoor, Kartik Aaryan, Nayanthara, and Smriti Mandhana. I've run 12-shoot campaigns for Lakmé and managed ₹15L+ ad budgets for Pink Flower. But what I'm most proud of isn't the scale — it's the consistency. Every call sheet, every call time, every continuity check builds the trust that lets a director focus on the work.

contact.intro: Available for freelance and in-house productions in Mumbai and across India.
contact.confirmation: Message sent — I'll get back to you shortly.
contact.error: Something didn't go through. Try again or email directly.

testimonials.quote: Donayan brings a level of organization and calm to set that's rare in this industry. Directors ask for her by name.
From pre-production through wrap, she anticipates problems before they happen. A producer's producer.
Working with Donayan means the production runs itself so you can focus on the creative.
